data.title: Solana aims for $95 rebound despite hurdles, $88 resistance key, $80 support crucial. Bulls target $95-$100, bears watch for $80 breakdown.
data.description: SOL is currently facing a significant challenge at the $88 resistance level, with technical indicators showing a mixed outlook. If the bullish scenario plays out, the price may target the range of $95-$100. On the other hand, bears are monitoring the possibility of a breakdown below the $80 support level.

data.title: Cardano (ADA) price targets $0.27 rebound with RSI at 42.71. Bullish breakout above $0.26 pivot key.
data.description: Cardano's cryptocurrency ADA is currently priced at $0.25, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 42.71, indicating a neutral momentum. Analysis of the technical aspects suggests a possible rebound towards the $0.27 resistance level if the bulls are able to regain control above the $0.26 pivot mark in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: XRP price reaches $1.36, facing $1.42 resistance, with downside risk to $1.31. Signals are neutral, with support at $1.31.
data.description: XRP is currently trading at $1.36 with indications of a neutral RSI and bearish MACD signals. Based on technical analysis, it is expected that a significant resistance level will be encountered at $1.42, while the support is anticipated to remain stable at $1.31 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: ETH could reach $2,200-$2,400 by April 2026 with neutral RSI at 46.23 and bullish MACD momentum. Technical analysis shows potential recovery in 4-6 weeks if resistance is breached.
data.description: With a neutral RSI reading of 46.23 and a bullish MACD momentum, Ethereum is poised for potential growth. Analysts predict that ETH may aim for a recovery between $2,200 and $2,400 in the next 4 to 6 weeks if it surpasses key resistance levels.

data.title: Indian authorities detain suspect linked to Myanmar crypto scam, luring victims with fake job offers and funneling them to  fraud compounds.
data.description: According to a report from the CBI, a man deceived individuals from India by offering them fake job opportunities, ultimately leading them into cryptocurrency scam operations within the Myawaddy region of Myanmar.
